list.name: hostname
list.query: SELECT hostname FROM agents ORDER BY hostname
list.label: Host

targets.rawSql: SELECT hostname, display_name, location, agent_status, cpu_percent, ram_percent, dns_service_name, dns_service_active, last_seen AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS last_seen, expected_dns_service FROM v_agent_current_status WHERE hostname = '$hostname'
SELECT fingerprint, fingerprint_first_seen AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS first_seen, fingerprint_last_seen AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS last_seen FROM agents WHERE hostname = '$hostname'

options.css: * { font-family: 'Inter','Segoe UI',sans-serif; box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; } @keyframes pulse-green{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(0,200,81,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(0,200,81,0)}} @keyframes pulse-red{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(244,67,54,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(244,67,54,0)}} @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', ts) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS ts, ROUND(AVG(cpu_percent)::numeric,1) AS cpu, ROUND(AVG(load_1m)::numeric,2) AS load1 FROM metrics_cpu WHERE hostname = '$hostname' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', ts) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS ts, ROUND(AVG(ram_percent)::numeric,1) AS ram, ROUND(AVG(swap_percent)::numeric,1) AS swap FROM metrics_ram WHERE hostname = '$hostname' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS ts, domain, latency_ms, success, error_code FROM dns_checks WHERE hostname = '$hostname' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (mountpoint) mountpoint, disk_percent, used_gb, total_gb, alert_level, ts FROM metrics_disk WHERE hostname = '$hostname' ORDER BY mountpoint, ts DESC
